data.description:
Catch prompt/schema drift at build time.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CI gate diffs declared front-matter vars vs template vars (undeclared = error; required-unsupplied = error); strict undefined-throws rendering.
- [ ] Variants modeled as overlays on one base with a cycle guard; emit full JSON Schema (explicit required).
Files: src/rebar/llm/prompts.py
data.title: WS-F2: Template-variable parity gate + variants
